top_findings.summary: The skill requests the ability to execute any Bash command via "Bash(cmd:*)" in its allowed tools, which is excessive for its stated primary purpose of Git integration and AI-assisted workflows. While legitimate Git operations may require command execution, this broad permission could enable actions unrelated to Git, such as accessing sensitive system files, running arbitrary scripts, or performing unauthorized modifications, posing a security risk. A more restricted permission set limited to Git-specific commands or necessary file operations would be appropriate.
